name: Container Resource Limits
description: Enforces CPU and memory resource limits on the devcontainer via cgroup v2 configuration

cpuLimit.description: CPU limit (e.g., 2 for 2 cores, 0.5 for half a core). Empty means no limit.

memoryLimit.description: Memory limit (e.g., 4g, 512m). Empty means no limit.

swapLimit.description: Swap limit (e.g., 4g, 512m). Empty means no limit.

pidsLimit.description: Maximum number of PIDs allowed in the container. 0 means no limit.
